name: Seafood Tetrazzini
recipeIngredient: 10 1/2 ounces Cream of mushroom soup, condensed, undiluted
1 cup Elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
1 cup Tuna, shrimp or crabmeat, flaked & drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, place 2 tablespoons butter.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
3. Add minced onion to melted butter and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until onion is tender.
4. Add soup, water, and cooked macaroni to onions. Blend well.
5. Add remaining ingredients, except the second 1/4 cup Parmesan cheese, to macaroni mixture. Combine well. Sprinkle remaining Parmesan cheese on top.
6. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 10 minutes.
7. If desired, topping can be browned by placing under conventional broiler for 3 minutes.
